definition:
1. changing one's abode, emigrating and settling elsewhere , (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. as Substantive μέτοικος, ἡ, an alien settled in a foreign city, a settler, emigrant, sojourner , (Aeschulus Tragicus), etc.; μ. γῆς one who has settled in  a country, (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
3. at Athens, a resident alien , who paid a tax  μετοίκιον); but enjoyed no civic rights, (Thucydides), etc. (ML)
